speaker: MATT
raw_text: Three? So you can move it 15 feet a round. It's slower than any of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's sitting on top of it? That's the city? The roots of the city crushing down--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's the roots of the city crushing down into this chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Could be a Rick and Morty portal to the Shadowfell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where the titan ends and Thomara begins would be this particular threshold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So we could go up from here? This is where we go up. You can get that sphere again and tunnel up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have the sphere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, we go straight into the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, the sphere is back in the tunnel with you. You can concentrate on it and bring it with you and it moves at a very slow speed.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We haven't moved very far.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We've only gone a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure, I'll bring it as far as we've gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Cool. So what's your intelligence modifier, again?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Now it's three.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Between the both of you focusing in the still silence, you can hear very faint distant muttering of conversation, briefly, on the left archway. But around you, aside from the small skittering of an occasional hand that is crawling its way forward, you don't see any full-bodied undead. In fact, in comparison to the chamber you'd exited more than an hour ago, which had hundreds and hundreds of wandering undead, this is mostly vacant of anything that isn't directly at those archways.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, put them on us.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Disguise him! Put him in a hat, gloves.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to instantly throw a robe over top of Scanlan. You've got a robe on you now. I put a robe on, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you put on a robe and Scanlan puts on a robe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They know that the orb was with two of the others, so as long as we keep the distance, everything should be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so now we're legit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we look like we're with them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, twins? How do our flanks look if we move forward? Is it just trees? Is it buildings?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was about to ask. We see flickering light far away, but I don't trust anything. I want to specifically see if anything besides twitching fingers and toes are hiding closer to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I'm listening for voices. Do I hear anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perception check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Note you have Freedom of Movement. How long does it last? Is it an hour?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wonderful. We have the jenga. We can do the jenga!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're the only one who'll be saying jenga, pretty much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can do the jenga. What do we do if it's jenga?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We kill everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We think well of you and move on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stick close to Vex in case she needs backup, but also if Scanlan needs backup. Ready to run in.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The only person going forward is you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Before he goes, I grab him, and I cast Freedom of Movement on him. You can't be grappled.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you cast something to help his charisma and his persuasion?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, actually, I can, because Freedom of Movement is not a concentration spell. So I'm going to burn my last 2nd-level spell and do Enhance Ability to give you--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Advantage on charisma checks?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Peacock's Charisma or whatever the fuck it's called.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you have Freedom of Movement for an hour. Everyone else who's not going forward, make a stealth check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're the only one who'll be saying jenga, pretty much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can do the jenga. What do we do if it's jenga?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We kill everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We think well of you and move on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stick close to Vex in case she needs backup, but also if Scanlan needs backup. Ready to run in.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The only person going forward is you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Before he goes, I grab him, and I cast Freedom of Movement on him. You can't be grappled.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you cast something to help his charisma and his persuasion?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, actually, I can, because Freedom of Movement is not a concentration spell. So I'm going to burn my last 2nd-level spell and do Enhance Ability to give you--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Advantage on charisma checks?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Peacock's Charisma or whatever the fuck it's called.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Note you have Freedom of Movement. How long does it last? Is it an hour?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: An hour.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, they've all been in there for about two minutes, at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I would say collapse the tunnel, then go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We still have to collapse the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. But kill them, and then make a loud noise. Because as soon as we start shit rumbling, everybody gets paranoid and upset.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'd have to be lucky.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're probably getting down to Odell at this point. We should hurry!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can throw up a wall of stone to block the tunnel we came from, and then we go and we do the other stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it and go!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay! I'm burning the last of my shit! 6th-level spell Wall of Stone!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The tunnel we came from.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you create a stone over that entrance?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Once they're all in there, we block them in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We block it up completely.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If they're all in there.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The spell only lasts for up to ten minutes, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can keep blowing his mind like this. It's quite nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all right, shit. Do you know how close it is?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's within a thousand feet. Right? Yeah, no, I only sense things within a thousand feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How much of a problem is the Move Earth, and how far can we go? A thousand feet, with the Move Earth?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if I point Keyleth in the direction? Can you glide as an earth elemental and find it that way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do consider, once you do find it, the sword cannot earthglide with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it can't?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If only we had some sort of sphere!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If only somebody hadn't sent it away! Which is, by the way, chasing behind us still.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shit. But when it catches up to us, we'll take it back!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe see if you can sense it right now. See if you can take it back right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Simon? Answer your master. I can't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keep trying.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so this lasts up to two hours, concentration, and you can move a 40-foot space to create a tunnel every ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, the ring. Within 60 feet of each other. All of this was a waste of time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Tunnel!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, I tunnel, then! Fucking hell!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This was so much DND right there. All the DND. Everyone who's ever played DND is right now going "yep, I've been there." All right, so what's the plan?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We tunnel towards the fucking sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We collapse the tunnels behind us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pike and I charge out of the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You lead us, we go straight there. Less than a thousand feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know that this is burning, but we've got no choice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We know the direction. Go in that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are we going to try and go above, or are we tunnelling all the way there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: In the direction that I'm pointing. Tunnel that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to burn my 8th-level spell on Move Earth. I still have a 9th, and then this is reaching the end of my shit.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Pike was being carried. His roll was dependent on both of them. So as you guys dart through the open light, the first time you've seen light since arriving in this titan. The sky outside is super dark; most of the light here is actually emanating from the barrier. It's creating its own false twilight sense over this entire city. As you rush into the room, you all dart into the nearby doorway. There's a half-ajar door that's broken, and you push through, being careful not to slam into it or to break it and cause any noise, but you all rush into this chamber. Immediately, the smell wafts of old decay, and glancing around, you can see long-dried bits of flesh or nondescript innards that have long withered and turned to partial dust. You all come into the shadow of the chamber and take a minute to breathe. You hear the distant sound (screeching, flapping, crunch). You hear one perch on one of the buildings about one block down (screeching, flapping) and continue off. It does not appear that you are currently being stalked or noticed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm talking about my big mack daddies in order to still cast other things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I had to roll for both of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But you have advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You had to roll for both of us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But I had advantage. I think we're okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For everyone paying attention, I have three 1st-level spells left, no 2nd-level spells, two 3rd, one 4th, and then an 8th and a 9th. And that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You have advantage on this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do I have advantage? Well, I might have advantage also. I'm in the Silence spell also. Not that I need it, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That advantage saved that whole thing from going tits-up, because that first roll was (explosion).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural 19, so 29.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 18 plus nine plus another ten. 38.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 24. Wait, don't high-five shit yet! Why are you high-fiving? What the fuck? What's wrong with you people? Jesus!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What did Pike get?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 12? Okay. You're not sure of the distance based on the angle, but you know it's getting closer. So you guys begin darting from building to building. Keyleth is straggling a bit behind and ends up stubbing her toe and instinctually lets out a yelp sound. At which point, you hear a distant shriek.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Another one?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I love you guys. Please come back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, don't fuck me, opal die. That opal die fucked me. Wait, do I have advantage? No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You have plus ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Right out of the gate?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you get?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does my luck transfer to anybody? No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do anything else? Okay, let's go! And I run into a door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you guys rush outward into the open way, you begin to head across the thoroughfare, following Vex, who's currently leading the charge, and you can sense it down below. At this point, based on the trajectory of it, make an intelligence check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They covered for me, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Intelligence?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, roll plus your intelligence modifier.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Right. Okay, so you duck into a small alleyway. You guys are keeping out of view and waiting for the swarms of undead in the street, and as you come around the corner you immediately see about 12 or 13 zombies clattering past. As you're waiting for them to pass by, eventually they get quieter and quieter. You take a minute and you cast the spell Locate Object, and it's a much steeper angle now. You're getting much closer to it. So do you want to keep going?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you vaguely remember the direction it was in? So maybe we go vague for a minute?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So I pop my head out, Jaws-ing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I point in the direction and have her keep following it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to be like-- I'm going to follow their footsteps with my tremorsense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And as such, you don't have to make a stealth check. You're down below, and you follow their footsteps underneath. You guys continue on your current stealth run. You get forward about another 150 or so feet. Do you want to keep going or do you want to cast?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is there an abandoned-looking building or anything I can duck into?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a handful. Most of the city has been long abandoned.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then I'm going to duck under something so I can cast the spell and then re-stealth before I come back out so I don't bamf in the middle.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Five. Okay. You swim around for about a minute or so, and you're finding nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to tap my foot on the ground and point directly down to you, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Directly down. Doing this as I go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you swim down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, swimming down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, and you're feeling through earth. Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Not my strongest suit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With disadvantage because you are currently blind in the earth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can glide through it. But you can't see through the earth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm an earth elemental.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Give it a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, you got this. Let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just roll high.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just drop it out your hand and watch as--

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I count the ones out? Can I roll it again on the inside?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's not how it works.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it cocked? It looks cocked.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are we sure with disadvantage? Five.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been about 30 minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you eventually emerge from the top as you suffer another seven points of acid damage and manage to earthglide. You watch as all of a sudden the water separates and bursts, and you watch as her earth elemental form emerges, its hand coming up through the water, clutching a blackened blade.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Vex!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Shit. Trinket's still in my necklace. I wonder if I bamf him out-- he wasn't covered in oil-- if he'd be in the regular plane or if he would be in the Ethereal Plane.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You may never see your bear-- nope. Playing devil's advocate. Cosmic bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Cosmic bear?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does he become a constellation after that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He'll look like Eternity from Marvel Comics. He'll be this star bear--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Would he be an ethereal bear, or would be bamf out in the regular plane?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a big risk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How much time has it been?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, so you're here for a while. Okay. So you guys sit and wait, carefully thinking, contemplating. Over the next 30 minutes or so, eventually you begin to watch as Vex'ahlia's form begins to emerge once more into this plane.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Best episode ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Come on, damn it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the cold sense of worry comes over you, you clutch the necklace and there's a flash as you watch Trinket's form burst from the necklace, gray and shaded. And you see as Trinket pops out of nowhere. By the way, between the two of you, you guys are pretty crammed into here to not be in the acid right now. You're both like (grunts). (confused bear noises)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (bear noises) Where's Vex? Vex?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's sniffing around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was basically trying to let her know where I was.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I saw him appear suddenly, right? Okay. Vex? Okay, I pet Trinket for an indeterminate amount of time. I wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you chill? Right here. Because this is where I am. Can we wait it out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can. How long can you hold your form?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Half my level.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You concentrate for a minute as the stone's energy fills you. You flash and all of a sudden you're standing over the other stone--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's back!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This was the stupidest idea we've ever--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (sobbing in relief)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket, get back in the necklace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket is licking your face intensely.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're such a good bear. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I want to drop my form. Is this it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's it. But here's the thing, should you glide back to the mansion, I stone back to the mansion with the sword? Okay, give me the sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I give her the sword. I have the sword. Is it the sword? It is the sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's what you saw, yeah. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know where the mansion is, right? Vaguely?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can glide back to the mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It might take you a little while, but you can find your way back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go? Okay, I'll see you soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Good luck. And I'm going to think of the stone. I already put Trinket back in the necklace.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You hear the sword go  "It's been so long."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "His secrets, his followers, all of it must topple. You will be my instrument."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Apparently, I'm going to be an instrument. He's going to play me to topple the followers and his secrets.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What does it want from you in return?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a good question, Pike! (whispering) What do you require from me in return?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Just wield me. Spill blood for me. Bring me to the Undying King and cut his throat with my blade. That's all I ask. That's all I need."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He really doesn't ask much. Just average run-of-the-mill fight stuff. Be true to thy friend. This one is nothing to worry about.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's still currently embedded in its scabbard.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Reception problems. Hold on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like that you grab it by the blade.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Weapons training.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm proficient.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I'm afraid it doesn't work that way, but I could give the mere passage of an hour."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if you'd like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, I'm sure I can figure out a way."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's real dicey at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "But I'm sure if you succeed, that won't be a problem, and if you fail, well, then I guess the deal's off, anyway."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Very true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Second  I wish to strangle you until death." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's into autoerotic asphyxiation?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Amazing! Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, Grog. I'm sorry. Come again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I wish to put my hands on your throat until you expire. If you say you're unkillable, well, that's a new experience entirely."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Okay. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Will you come back? Have we tested this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vex, be quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have one further request on our end. Can you send us backward in time?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Day for an hour. I think it's a fair trade, yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if you'd like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, I'm sure I can figure out a way."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's real dicey at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "But I'm sure if you succeed, that won't be a problem, and if you fail, well, then I guess the deal's off, anyway."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Very true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Second  I wish to strangle you until death." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's into autoerotic asphyxiation?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Amazing! Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, Grog. I'm sorry. Come again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I wish to put my hands on your throat until you expire. If you say you're unkillable, well, that's a new experience entirely."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Okay. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Will you come back? Have we tested this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vex, be quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have one further request on our end. Can you send us backward in time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm afraid it doesn't work that way, but I could give the mere passage of an hour."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mere passage of an hour? That's good, yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Sure. Day for an hour. 24 hours are yours to do as you like."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Very true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Second  I wish to strangle you until death." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's into autoerotic asphyxiation?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Amazing! Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, Grog. I'm sorry. Come again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I wish to put my hands on your throat until you expire. If you say you're unkillable, well, that's a new experience entirely."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Okay. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Will you come back? Have we tested this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vex, be quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have one further request on our end. Can you send us backward in time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm afraid it doesn't work that way, but I could give the mere passage of an hour."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mere passage of an hour? That's good, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Day for an hour. I think it's a fair trade, yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you give us a full day in order to make sure that he does come back?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. You watch over the next minute or so as he strangles the life out of Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is so dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I step up behind Vax in case he has an involuntary reaction to reach up to his arms. Just to keep his arms down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He locks in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No fear, remember.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Without making any other noise, continues to apply pressure. Eventually, your vision begins to go dark.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm so glad we can't see this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no. Underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'd be freaking out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I look away.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm peeking out of the pond.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I grab her and drag her right back to the pond.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is so weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This is your head, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You could have asked for a magic wand or a unicorn, a pony.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was a fascination with something different and new and you said "cannot die," and that immediately piqued his interest. Even the nicest of fey are weird and have their dark sides.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Preach, David Bowie.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "One day."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we going to rest here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but we need to do a feast before we go back. Well, the thing is, it uses a spell, so it has to be within the 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That will be the last thing we do before we go to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, but I want Vax to have the feast, as well, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we save him leftovers?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we have to wait a whole day before he comes back?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We don't know how long it takes. We can try to wait and see how long it takes and then rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have a little time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's give it some time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Besides, Garmelie gave us his word.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One day.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You've got time to think. We'll say for the purposes of the time you have been waiting. Hours pass. You're not sure how much time has passed. You've plotted, you've thought, you've napped, you've contemplated this weird bubble of time that now exists, this brief respite, but where it leads you is unique and strange. As you all begin to question and wonder, is he going to come back? Does he come back here? Last time you saw him, he arrived with you in the Feywild.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Plus, we all have our blessings-- not all of us. We have some blessings from gods that will activate, hopefully, right before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you do a one-day blessing on ten of us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can you cast Haste?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No. I mean, I could, but it seems like a shitty use--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If there's two of you and you could cast Haste on me, I'd take that over the flying creature.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If there's two of me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, you with Haste would be horrifying.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's nasty. It doesn't get me off the ground, but at close speed. I'd have a hundred feet of movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And another attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Plus an action surge.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't cast Haste. I don't know it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can't? Hey, Pike, do you know Haste?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No. It's not a cleric spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Who does?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: None of us have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just the boots.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You've got a decision to make. We've got sleep to get.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Anyway, rest well, see you guys in a week, and is it Thursday yet? Good night. [music]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was probably an eventuality. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can the episode title be "Dicks and Dicks"? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll see what I can do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Dungeons and Dicks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But anyway, thank you guys. We're going to get some rest. Thank you guys for going with us through this very interesting episode.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ashley, your drawing was amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ashley!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Post that shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. We'll return next week, and I think we'll have a special guest next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What? Is that true?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Marvel Puzzle Quest.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Marvel Puzzle Quest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Show them support, show them love, guys. They really appreciate it. Tweet at them, follow them on Facebook, add them as a LinkedIn friend. Sext them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Check their Myspace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sext them? Yeah, send them a bunch of porn links.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, don't do that. Please don't do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was a joke! (laughter)
